---
title: "Counterfactual Regret Minimization"
short-title: "CFR"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "CFR theory, Libratus and Pluribus, and an R+Python implementation."
keywords: ["CFR", "counterfactual regret", "poker", "imperfect information", "Libratus"]
---

# CFR {#sec-cfr}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
